name: Sommore
bio: Sommore is an American stand-up comedian and actress known as the Diva of Contemporary Comedy, with a style built on biting sarcasm and frank talk about money, sex, and equality between the sexes. She was the first female host of BET's long-running ComicView and one of the four headliners of The Queens of Comedy tour. She has continued releasing stand-up specials, including a Netflix release of The Reign Continues.

timeline.ev: Becomes the first female host of BET's ComicView
Headlines The Queens of Comedy tour and Showtime special
Releases the special The Queen Stands Alone

accolades: Received the Richard Pryor Award for Comic of the Year
First female host of BET's ComicView
Headliner of the record-setting Queens of Comedy tour
